case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. DUANE E BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, DUANE E DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2009
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-25-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-27-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DUANE E BROWN FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-27-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-27-2010 CONTINUED TO APR-28-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-28-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KURTISS A. JACOBS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-25-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-10-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
